title: Upgrade Pydantic v1 → v2 and FastAPI to Latest
problem: Pins Pydantic 1.10.13 (EOL) and FastAPI 0.92.0 (over 2 years old). Uses from_orm and class Config: orm_mode = True (v1-only patterns).
approach: Use bump-pydantic codemod to auto-migrate. Convert orm_mode → model_config, from_orm → model_validate. Upgrade FastAPI to 0.115+. Run test suite after each module.

title: Add Rate Limiting and API Abuse Protection
problem: No rate limiting on any endpoint. Signal validation triggers expensive Celery tasks. Auth endpoints have no brute-force protection.
approach: Install slowapi. Add global rate limit (100 req/min per IP). Apply stricter limits to compute-heavy endpoints (5/min for validate, 10/min for publish). Use Redis for counters.

title: Fix Critical CVEs in aiohttp and Dependencies
problem: aiohttp 3.8.6 has multiple CVEs. passlib 1.7.4 unmaintained. psycopg2 outdated. pip-audit exists but not running in CI.
approach: Upgrade aiohttp to 3.11+, asyncpg, psycopg2. Add pip-audit to CI with --strict. Replace passlib with bcrypt directly.

title: Add Test Coverage for Untested Critical Modules
problem: ~40-50% of critical logic untested. schema_builder, translators, analytical_db have zero tests despite complex logic.
approach: Priority 1: Add tests for translators - test sort_calculations_by_dependency, translate, find_join_on_columns. Target 80% coverage on translator.

title: Implement Redis Caching for Validator Hot Paths
problem: TODO comments flag uncached DB calls in validator hot paths. Repeated validation queries hit DB unnecessarily.
approach: Add Redis caching for validator queries. Cache schema, group filters, ordering configs with TTL. Implement cache invalidation on schema changes.

title: Add Comprehensive API Documentation
problem: No API docs. OpenAPI schema generated but no interactive docs. Developers need clear API reference.
approach: Add Swagger UI at /docs. Add ReDoc at /redoc. Add request/response examples. Document error codes and rate limits.

title: Implement WebSocket for Real-Time Signal Updates
problem: Clients must poll for signal status updates. No real-time updates when signals are validated or published.
approach: Add WebSocket endpoint for signal updates. Push status changes to connected clients. Add heartbeat/ping-pong for connection health.

title: Add GraphQL API Layer
problem: Only REST API exists. Clients need flexible queries for complex signal hierarchies and relationships.
approach: Add GraphQL with strawberry or Ariadne. Define schema for signals, users, schemas. Add query optimization with dataloaders.

title: Implement Comprehensive Audit Logging
problem: No audit trail for signal changes, user actions, schema modifications.
approach: Add audit log table. Track all CRUD operations with user, timestamp, before/after values. Add audit query endpoint for admins.

title: Add Performance Monitoring and Tracing
problem: No APM or tracing. Hard to debug slow requests or identify bottlenecks.
approach: Add OpenTelemetry or Sentry. Instrument all endpoints. Add latency histograms and error rate dashboards.
